'''Tas Kee''' was a [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] enforcer for the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Hat Lo/Legends|Hat Lo]]. She protected Lo's interests on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and kept watch over his consort, [[Ayy Vida/Legends|Ayy Vida]].

==Biography==
A [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] of<ref name="tk" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="AlienAnthology">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref> [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]], the [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] Tas Kee was one of multiple protectors for [[Hat Lo/Legends|Hat Lo]],<ref name="tk" /> a [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] based on<ref name="CSWE2">{{CSWECite|II|258|Lo, Hat}}</ref> the planet<ref name="AotCVD">''[[Star Wars: Attack of the Clones: The Visual Dictionary]]''</ref> [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="AotCVD" /> Hired in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|205|Kee, Tas}}</ref> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]<ref name="NEC2">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of {{Film|II}} to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].</ref> between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], she protected the crime lord's interests in Coruscant's [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] and extortion rackets.<ref name="Insider">{{InsiderCite|75|Who's Who in the Outlander Club: It's Ladies' Night}}</ref> Kee was under instruction to keep an eye on [[Ayy Vida/Legends|Ayy Vida]], Lo's Twi'lek consort.<ref name="FF96">{{FactFile|96|OUT 1-2|Outlander Nightclub Patrons}}</ref> The Weequay was also a frequent patron of [[Dex's Diner/Legends|Dex's Diner]]<ref name="CSWE" /> in Coruscant's [[CoCo Town/Legends|CoCo Town]] district.<ref name="FF54">{{FactFile|54|COR 23-26|Coruscant – Dex's Diner}}</ref>

==Personality and traits==
The ruthless<ref name="Scrapbook">''[[Star Wars: Attack of the Clones Scrapbook]]''</ref> Tas Kee was the only thing that kept Ayy Vida from fleeing from Hat Lo,<ref name="FF96" /> and the Twi'lek lived in<ref name="Insider" /> fear of the enforcer.<ref name="av">{{DB|character|ayyvida|Vida, Ayy}}</ref> Kee was an acquaintance of [[Lowle Ch'red]], a [[Coruscanti/Legends|Coruscanti]] woman who frequented Dex's Diner as she did.<ref name="lc">{{DB|character|lowlechred|Ch'red, Lowle}}</ref> The Weequay had frizzy, braided [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]], green [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], and<ref name="tk" /> [[Leather/Legends|leathery]]<ref name="Insider" /> brown skin.<ref name="tk" />

==Skills and abilities==
Kee was an adept at hiding weapons on her body, making sure Lo was protected by avoiding<ref name="CSWE" /> the few<ref name="tk" /> scanners and sensors<ref name="CSWE" /> in the [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|Coruscant undercity]].<ref name="tk" />

==Equipment==
The enforcer wore discarded dark [[Clothing/Legends|clothing]] and a maroon hat.<ref name="AotCVD" /> She was always armed, with the several weapons on her person<ref name="Insider" /> crafted to evade Coruscant's undercity sensors and scanners,<ref name="tk" /> and designed to evade standard sensors.<ref name="Scrapbook" /> Even though they were made in this way, Kee still arranged them in a way to trick security scanners.<ref name="Insider" /> The Weequay also carried concealed [[knockout drops]] near her hips.<ref name="AotCVD" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tas Kee first appeared in the [[2002]] film [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']].<ref name="tk" />
